notes: People-search / data broker site (owned by PeopleConnect, same parent as BeenVerified). Correct result: MEDIUM (53). Score breakdown: people_search_site(+20) + privacy_registrar(+8) + discount_registrar(+5) + dv_cert_only(+5) + cloudflare_proxy(+5) + platform_mismatch(+10) = 53. Title and description clearly identify it as a background-check / people-search service. WHOIS privacy-protected via Domains By Proxy. Registered via Namecheap (discount registrar). Magento detected alongside people-search content — platform mismatch fires. Domain is 3,847 days old so no age signal.

metadata.title: PeopleLooker | Background Check & People Search
metadata.description: Instantly search public records, background check anyone, find contact info, and verify identities with PeopleLooker.
